overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic open-world game (Fallout 4), showing a character in a trench coat and hat walking through a ruined urban street at sunset. The environment features abandoned vehicles, crumbling brick buildings, and a hazy orange sky, with the character exploring the desolate cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined residential street with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: character in long coat walking steadily down the center of the debris-filled street, surveying the abandoned surroundings

entered.detail: tall damaged brick apartment buildings with broken windows and crumbling facades
rusted silver car wreck with open doors sitting on the left side of the street
faded red fabric awning over a ground-floor shop entrance
tilted metal street lamp with broken fixture
trees with orange and red autumn foliage lining the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking down a desolate post-apocalyptic city street during golden hour. Abandoned brick buildings line the left side while autumn trees stand on the right. A wrecked silver sedan sits abandoned on the left as the character moves forward through the debris-strewn asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection area with multiple wrecked vehicles and overhead signage

events.description: character passes the abandoned silver sedan on the left and continues toward the center of the street
large yellow abandoned truck and overhead billboard come into view ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating around debris and wrecked cars while approaching a large yellow truck blocking part of the road ahead

entered.detail: dark-colored van wreck sitting in the middle of the road
large yellow truck with rust and damage parked ahead on the right side
large empty metal billboard frame extending over the street
dark-colored car wreck on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the first abandoned car into a more cluttered intersection area. A dark van sits in the road center while a distinctive yellow truck and large overhead billboard appear in the distance. The ruined brick buildings remain on the left as the character navigates through the wreckage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching large overhead billboard with distant ruins visible

events.description: character passes the yellow abandoned truck on the right side
character walks directly underneath the large overhead billboard structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the yellow truck and continuing toward the billboard while surveying the open area ahead

entered.detail: ruined skyscrapers and structures visible on the horizon through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character passes the yellow truck and approaches the massive overhead billboard that spans the width of the street. The environment opens up to reveal distant ruined skyscrapers on the horizon. Walking under the empty billboard frame, the character continues toward the more open area ahead as the sun sets through the hazy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban street that gradually opens from a narrow corridor of ruins into a wide vista of a fallen city. It begins with the character walking past abandoned brick buildings and autumn trees, navigating debris-strewn asphalt beside a wrecked silver sedan. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a cluttered intersection where a dark van obstructs the road and a yellow truck appears in the distance. The perspective then expands as the character passes the truck and walks beneath a massive overhead billboard that spans the street. Finally, the environment opens up completely to reveal distant ruined skyscrapers on the horizon under a hazy, setting sun.
